mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.nickname AS user_name, u.avatar AS user_avatar, ru.nickname AS reply_to_user_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
